title: Maximum Balanced Subsequence Sum
description: Return the maximum nonempty subsequence sum such that for consecutive chosen indices i<j, nums[j]-nums[i] >= j-i. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: nums: list[int]. 1 <= len(nums) <= 100000; -1e9 <= nums[i] <= 1e9; subsequence must be nonempty.
output_contract: Return long using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
